children.label: A
children.text: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences.

children.label: B
children.text: The Directors Guild of America.

children.label: C
children.text: The Writers Guild of America. The Writers Guild of America East and the Writers Guild of America West shall each nominate three candidates, and a representative from one organization shall be selected as the member and a representative from the other organization as the alternate.

children.label: D
children.text: The National Society of Film Critics.

children.label: E
children.text: The Society for Cinema and Media Studies.

children.label: F
children.text: The American Film Institute.

children.label: G
children.text: The Department of Film, Television, and Digital Media of the School of Theater, Film and Television at the University of California, Los Angeles.

children.label: H
children.text: The Department of Cinema Studies of the Tisch School of the Arts at New York University.

children.label: I
children.text: The University Film and Video Association.

children.label: J
children.text: The Motion Picture Association of America.

children.label: K
children.text: The Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers.

children.label: L
children.text: Screen Actors Guild.

children.label: M
children.text: The National Association of Theater Owners.

children.label: N
children.text: The American Society of Cinematographers and the International Photographers Guild, which shall jointly submit one list of three candidates from which a member and alternate will be selected.

children.label: O
children.text: The United States Members of the International Federation of Film Archives.

children.label: P
children.text: The Association of Moving Image Archivists.

children.label: Q
children.text: The Society of Composers and Lyricists.

children.heading: Members-at-large
children.label: 2 Members-at-large
children.text: In addition to the members appointed under paragraph (1), the Librarian shall appoint up to 5 members-at-large. The Librarian shall also select an alternate for each member at-large, who may attend at Board expense those meetings which the member at-large cannot attend.22So in original. Probably should be followed by a hyphen.2

children.heading: Chair
children.label: b Chair
children.text: The Librarian shall appoint one member of the Board to serve as Chair.

children.heading: Terms
children.label: 1 Terms
children.text: The term of each member of the Board shall be 4 years, except that there shall be no limit to the number of terms that any individual member may serve.

children.heading: Removal of member or organization
children.label: 2 Removal of member or organization
children.text: The Librarian shall have the authority to remove any member of the Board, or the organization listed in subsection (a) such member represents, if the member, or organization, over any consecutive 2-year period, fails to attend at least one regularly scheduled Board meeting.

children.heading: Vacancies
children.label: 3 Vacancies
children.text: A vacancy in the Board shall be filled in the manner in which the original appointment was made under subsection (a), except that the Librarian may fill the vacancy from a list of candidates previously submitted by the organization or organizations involved. Any member appointed to fill a vacancy before the expiration of the term for which his or her predecessor was appointed shall be appointed for the remainder of such term.

children.heading: Quorum
children.label: d Quorum
children.text: 12 members of the Board shall constitute a quorum but a lesser number may hold hearings.

children.heading: Reimbursement of expenses
children.label: e Reimbursement of expenses
children.text: Members of the Board shall serve without pay, but may receive travel expenses, including per diem in lieu of subsistence, in accordance with sections 5702 and 5703 of title 5.

children.heading: Meetings
children.label: f Meetings
children.text: The Board shall meet at least once each fiscal year. Meetings shall be at the call of the Librarian.

children.heading: Conflict of interest
children.label: g Conflict of interest
children.text: The Librarian shall establish rules and procedures to address any potential conflict of interest between a member of the Board and responsibilities of the Board.
